description_long: This is a small, single-engine propeller airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a white body with blue accents along the fuselage and wingtips, as well as green-tinted cockpit windows. The registration number 'F-IAOA' is prominently displayed on the wings and fuselage. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both accented with blue. The landing gear is fixed and tricycle-type, with visible wheels under the nose and main fuselage. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit appears to be enclosed with a single canopy.
description: A small, single-engine, low-wing propeller airplane with blue and white livery, green cockpit windows, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and white fuselage, green cockpit windows, and the propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, green-tinted cockpit, and the full wingspan with blue-tipped ends.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine cowling, landing gear, and registration number on the wing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and slight dihedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and green-tinted windows.
